books.title: Progress and Poverty
books.author: Henry George
books.summary: An explanation on why increased productivity has not led to increased wages, and how the application of a single land value tax can fix this and lead to a more just society.

books.title: The Courts of the Morning
books.author: John Buchan
books.summary: A Scottish laird foments rebellion in a South American country threatened by a hostile regime.

books.title: Geronimo’s Story of His Life
books.author: Geronimo
books.summary: The Apache war chief Geronimo recounts the story of his life.

books.title: Queen Victoria
books.author: Lytton Strachey
books.summary: A sardonic and generally unflattering biography of Victoria Alexandrina, Queen of England.

books.title: Emily of New Moon
books.author: L. M. Montgomery
books.summary: A budding poetess and orphan goes to live with her estranged aunts.

books.title: English as She Is Spoke
books.author: Pedro Carolino
books.summary: A phrasebook of unintentionally hilarious English.

books.title: The Importance of Being Earnest
books.author: Oscar Wilde
books.summary: A comedy skewering Victorian high society.

books.title: The Surprising Adventures of Baron Munchausen
books.author: Rudolph Erich Raspe
books.summary: The legendary Baron Munchausen’s tall tales of wonder and adventure.

books.title: The Life and Adventures of Robinson Crusoe
books.author: Daniel Defoe
books.summary: Shipwrecked on a remote tropical island, a resourceful Englishman manages to survive alone for many years.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Arthur Machen
books.summary: A collection of nine short fiction works by influential supernatural and horror author Arthur Machen.

books.title: The House of the Dead
books.author: Fyodor Dostoevsky
books.summary: A ex-convict in 19th-century Russia reminisces on his experiences in a Siberian prison.

books.title: The Mystery of the Blue Train
books.author: Agatha Christie
books.summary: A retired detective finds himself at the scene of a murder aboard a French locomotive.

books.title: The Interesting Narrative of the Life of Olaudah Equiano
books.author: Olaudah Equiano
books.summary: An autobiography of an ex-slave in the mid 1700s.

books.title: Tractatus Logico-Philosophicus
books.author: Ludwig Wittgenstein
books.summary: One of the most important texts of 20th century philosophy, in which the nature of the philosophy, language, understanding, and logical atomism are explored.

books.title: The Pearl
books.author: Anonymous
books.summary: A father is heartbroken after losing his young daughter, whom he thinks of as a beautiful pearl he can never get back.

books.title: Sartor Resartus
books.author: Thomas Carlyle
books.summary: The meta-fictional commentary on the life of “famous” German philosopher Diogenes Teufelsdröckh and his Philosophy of Clothes.

books.title: The Black Star Passes
books.author: John W. Campbell
books.summary: Three scientists from Earth invent space travel and meet extraterrestrial life, but then must defend the solar system from a new threat.

books.title: Short Science Fiction
books.author: Isaac Asimov
books.summary: A collection of short science fiction by Isaac Asimov, ordered by date of original publication.

books.title: The Story of My Experiments with Truth
books.author: Mahatma Gandhi
books.summary: Gandhi relates his life experiences from his birth in Gujarat in 1869 through the Indian National Congress of 1915.

books.title: Through the Brazilian Wilderness
books.author: Theodore Roosevelt
books.summary: Theodore Roosevelt’s autobiographical account of his expedition into the uncharted depths of the Brazilian rainforest.
